subtitle.text: Corruption is transformation without consent. This is what the Nether does to things that stay too long.

description: The Netherite Monstrosity is a Nether depth boss (Cataclysm).
It is the boss that drops lacrima — the infernal age trigger.
It is also part of the Corrupted Eye ingredient chain.
The Biological Civilization merged with life.
The Netherite Monstrosity is what merging with the Nether looks like.
Lacrima is also the center ingredient in the Magical Eye recipe.
The ocean mages' inheritance requires what the Nether's worst produced.
Hold the lacrima. The infernal age begins.
→ Pick up the Lacrima it drops
